info.name: HubSpot Blog Authors API
info.description:
The HubSpot Blog Authors API enables you to manage author information for your 
blog posts. Create, update, retrieve, and delete blog author profiles, manage 
multi-language author groups, and perform batch operations on multiple authors 
at once.

## Key Features
- CRUD operations for blog author profiles
- Batch operations for bulk author management
- Multi-language support with language variations
- Author profile customization with social links


Contact Support:
 Name: HubSpot Developer Support
